name: Tomato Juice Cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and remove stem ends and cores, if present. Cut up the tomatoes.
2. Measure 19 cups of the chopped tomatoes. In an 8 to 10 quart kettle or Dutch oven, combine the tomatoes, celery, and onion.
3. Cover and cook slowly until the tomatoes are soft, about 15 minutes. Stir often.
4. Press the tomatoes through a food mill to extract the juices; measure 12 cups.
5. Boil the juice gently, uncovered, for about 30 minutes, stirring often.
6. Measure 9 1/2 to 10 cups of juice. Add lemon juice, sugar, salt, horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, and hot pepper sauce; simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Pour the hot juice into hot jars, leaving 1/2-inch headspace. Adjust lids.
8. Process in a boiling water bath (pints) for 10 minutes.
